citations.narrative:
The facility failed to submit their annual report for fiscal year 2025, which was due to the Deputy Administrator on or
before December 1st, 2025. Each reporting facility shall submit an annual report covering the use of live animals in the
previous federal fiscal year on or before December 1st of each calendar year to assure that professionally acceptable
standards governing the care and use of animals are followed.
The facility shall submit an annual report to the Deputy Administrator and the report shall cover the previous Federal fiscal
year.

A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process on Tuesday, May 19,
2026. The inspector attempted to contact the registrant by phone/voicemail at 9:50 am, text at 10:00 am, email at 10:05
am, and knocked on multiple doors at the facility at 10:25 am. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and
records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may
result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.36(a)  Repeat
   
Annual report. 
The facility failed to submit their annual report for fiscal year 2025, which was due to the Deputy Administrator on or 
before December 1st, 2025. Each reporting facility shall submit an annual report covering the use of live animals in the 
previous federal fiscal year on or before December 1st of each calendar year to assure that professionally acceptable 
standards governing the care and use of animals are followed. 
 
The facility shall submit an annual report to the Deputy Administrator and the report shall cover the previous Federal fiscal 
year. 
2.38(b)  Repeat
   
Miscellaneous. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process on Tuesday, May 19, 
2026. The inspector attempted to contact the registrant by phone/voicemail at 9:50 am, text at 10:00 am, email at 10:05 
am, and knocked on multiple doors at the facility at 10:25 am. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and 
records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may 
result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
